title: Cute Christmas Hotbar
body:
cutely made java christmas hotbar/gui/hud with with wreaths, candycane, snowglobe, presents, and reindeer ‧₊˚🎄✩ ₊˚🦌⊹♡

enjoy your christmas ♡ have good day~

for bedrock version please download here:

https://www.mediafire.com/file/8ppd0n5mblowxar/Cute-Christmas-Hotbar-1.21-BEDROCK-v2.mcpack/file

preview in the gallery!
